title: LegendWatch
description: A Hoplite mod that shows any legendary a player has craft in their nametag
body:
# LegendWatch

A client-side Fabric mod for the Hoplite server. Listens to chat for legendary craft announcements and displays a small icon of the crafted legendary directly on that player's nametag and in the tab list — so you always know who's carrying a legendary without digging through chat.

## Features

- Legendary icons appear on nametags above players' heads
- Legendary icons appear in the tab list
- If a player crafts multiple legendaries, all icons show side by side
- All 48 (+5) current Hoplite legendaries supported with unique icons
- Falls back to gold text for any unrecognized legendary
- Tracks legendary transfers — when a player is eliminated, their legendaries move to the killer's tag as predicted (shown with a `?`)
- Keybind to disable the mod entirely
- Keybind to switch between icon mode and name-only mode
- Keybind to toggle predicted legendary visibility
- Data clears automatically when a new match begins
- All keybinds are unbound by default and can be set in **Options → Controls → LegendWatch**
